# Test Samples

Samples are primarily downloaded from Apache POI public test data:

https://github.com/apache/poi/tree/trunk/test-data

Current matrix:

- Word 2003 `.doc`: 160 files
- Word 2007+ `.docx`: 163 files
- PowerPoint 2003 `.ppt`: 121 files
- PowerPoint 2007+ `.pptx`: 100 files
- Excel 2003 `.xls`: 395 files
- Excel 2007+ `.xlsx`: 350 files
- Negative fixtures: 136 files

Complex coverage includes:

- Images and drawings: `VariousPictures.docx`, `testPictures.doc`, `testCroppedPictures.doc`, `header_image.doc`, `picture.doc`, `pictures.ppt`, `chart-picture-bg.pptx`, `ppt_with_png.ppt`, `picture.xlsx`, `WithDrawing.xlsx`, `generated-docx-alt-attributes.docx`, `generated-docx-rich-parts.docx`, `generated-docx-smartart.docx`, `generated-docx-thumbnail.docx`, `generated-docx-vml.docx`, `generated-pptx-alt-attributes.pptx`, `generated-pptx-rich-parts.pptx`, `generated-pptx-thumbnail.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-alt-attributes.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-rich-parts.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-thumbnail.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-vml-drawing.xlsx`
- Tables, empty sheets, chart sheets, and merged cells: `deep-table-cell.docx`, `simple-table.doc`, `TestTableColumns.docx`, `innertable.doc`, `table-merges.doc`, `table_test.ppt`, `table_test.pptx`, `ExcelTables.xlsx`, `Tables.xlsx`, `45430.xlsx`, `47504.xlsx`, `51585.xlsx`, `51921-Word-Crash067.docx`, `56557.xlsx`, `58760.xlsx`, `60825.xlsx`, `61034.xlsx`, `BrNotClosed.xlsx`, `57893-many-merges.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-workbook-table-names.xlsx`
- Headers, footers, footnotes: `Headers.docx`, `headerFooter.docx`, `HeaderFooterUnicode.docx`, `HeaderFooterProblematic.doc`, `HeaderFooterComplexFormats.xlsx`, `footnote.doc`, `footnotes.docx`, `form_footnotes.docx`, `FancyFoot.doc`, `PageSpecificHeadFoot.doc`, `ThreeColHeadFoot.doc`, `endingnote.doc`
- Comments, notes, and tracked changes: `comment.docx`, `testComment.docx`, `WithComments.ppt`, `45545_Comment.pptx`, `comments.xls`, `SimpleWithComments.xls`, `comments.xlsx`, `SimpleWithComments.xlsx`, `commentTest.xlsx`, `bug56075-changeTracking_on.docx`, `delins.docx`, `generated-docx-rich-parts.docx`, `generated-pptx-chart-comment.pptx`, `generated-pptx-rich-parts.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-rich-parts.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-threaded-comments.xlsx`
- Charts, formulas, pivots, slicers, validation, and conditional formatting: `chartex.docx`, `61745.docx`, `44010-TwoCharts.xls`, `WithThreeCharts.xls`, `FormulaEvalTestData.xls`, `MatrixFormulaEvalTestData.xlsx`, `shared_formulas.xlsx`, `27349-vlookupAcrossSheets.xls`, `42464-ExpPtg-ok.xls`, `AbnormalSharedFormulaFlag.xls`, `ComplexFunctionTestCaseData.xls`, `ContinueRecordProblem.xls`, `ex47747-sharedFormula.xls`, `FormulaEvalTestData_Copy.xlsx`, `evaluate_formula_with_structured_table_references.xlsx`, `NewlineInFormulas.xlsx`, `overlapSharedFormula.xls`, `StructuredReferences.xlsx`, `xlookup.xlsx`, `VLookupFullColumn.xlsx`, `generated-docx-rich-parts.docx`, `generated-pptx-chart-comment.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-pivot-cache.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-rich-parts.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-slicer-cache.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-validation-hyperlink-attrs.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-workbook-table-names.xlsx`, `bar-chart.pptx`, `pie-chart.pptx`, `ExcelPivotTableSample.xlsx`, `ConditionalFormattingSamples.xls`, `ConditionalFormattingSamples.xlsx`, `55406_Conditional_formatting_sample.xlsx`
- Unicode, hyperlinks, fields, and legacy versions: `unicode-path.docx`, `HeaderFooterUnicode.doc`, `54880_chinese.ppt`, `with_japanese.pptx`, `54084 - Greek - beyond BMP.xlsx`, `hyperlink.doc`, `FieldCodes.docx`, `FldSimple.docx`, `WithHyperlink.xls`, `WithLinks.ppt`, `generated-docx-relationships.docx`, `generated-pptx-alt-attributes.pptx`, `generated-pptx-relationships.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-relationships.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-validation-hyperlink-attrs.xlsx`, `unicodeNameRecord.xls`, `unicodeSheetName.xlsx`, `TestChineseProperties.doc`, `TestShiftJIS.doc`, `TestUnicode.xls`, `Word6.doc`, `testEXCEL_95.xls`
- Embedded objects, custom XML, and media: `EmbeddedDocument.docx`, `word_with_embeded.doc`, `word_with_embeded_ooxml.doc`, `ppt_with_embeded.ppt`, `testPPT_oleWorkbook.ppt`, `ole2-embedding-2003.ppt`, `ole2-embedding.xls`, `WithEmbeddedObjects.xls`, `WithEmbeded.xlsx`, `bug64512_embed.xlsx`, `EmbeddedAudio.pptx`, `EmbeddedVideo.pptx`, `generated-docx-customxml.docx`, `generated-docx-embedded-legacy-ole.docx`, `generated-docx-embedded-ooxml.docx`, `generated-pptx-customxml.pptx`, `generated-pptx-embedded-legacy-ole.pptx`, `generated-pptx-embedded-ooxml.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-customxml.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-embedded-legacy-ole.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-embedded-ooxml.xlsx`, `test_recursive_embedded.docx`, `testPDFEmbeddingAndEmbedded.docx`, `multimedia.doc`
- Protection metadata, document properties, and macro-bearing files: `documentProtection_comments_no_password.docx`, `protected_sample.docx`, `sheetProtection_allLocked.xlsx`, `sheetProtection_not_protected.xlsx`, `protected_passtika.xlsx`, `workbookProtection_workbook_revision_protected.xlsx`, `workbookProtection_workbook_structure_protected.xlsx`, `workbookProtection_workbook_windows_protected.xlsx`, `workbookProtection_worksheet_protected.xlsx`, `workbookProtection-sheet_password-2013.xlsx`, `workbookProtection-workbook_password_user_range-2010.xlsx`, `workbookProtection-workbook_password-2013.xlsx`, `documentProperties.doc`, `TestWriteWellKnown.doc`, `generated-docx-docprops.docx`, `generated-pptx-docprops.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-docprops.xlsx`, `SimpleMacro.doc`, `HeaderWithMacros.doc`, `WithMacros.ppt`, `SimpleMacro.ppt`, `SimpleMacro.xls`, `SquareMacro.xls`
- Legacy regression set: many Apache POI numbered/bug fixtures such as `12843-1.xls`, `12843-2.xls`, `15228.xls`, `19599-1.xls`, `44593.xls`, `46904.xls`, `59858.xls`, `Bug46610_1.doc`, `Bug49908.doc`, `Bug52032_1.doc`, `Bug53380_3.doc`, `Bug60942.doc`, `Bug61268.doc`, `Word95.doc`, `word95err.doc`, `23884_defense_FINAL_OOimport_edit.ppt`, `41246-1.ppt`, `42474-2.ppt`, `customGeo.ppt`, `PPT95.ppt`, `bug45908.ppt`, `bug58718_008495.ppt`, integration `stress*.docx/.pptx/.xlsx`, openxml4j package fixtures, xmldsign signed/unsigned packages, and `bug55030.ppt`
- Generated OOXML edge fixtures: `generated-altchunk-html.docx`, `generated-docx-alt-attributes.docx`, `generated-docx-customxml.docx`, `generated-docx-docprops.docx`, `generated-docx-embedded-legacy-ole.docx`, `generated-docx-embedded-ooxml.docx`, `generated-docx-glossary.docx`, `generated-docx-relationships.docx`, `generated-docx-rich-parts.docx`, `generated-docx-smartart.docx`, `generated-docx-thumbnail.docx`, `generated-docx-vml.docx`, `generated-pptx-alt-attributes.pptx`, `generated-pptx-chart-comment.pptx`, `generated-pptx-customxml.pptx`, `generated-pptx-docprops.pptx`, `generated-pptx-embedded-legacy-ole.pptx`, `generated-pptx-embedded-ooxml.pptx`, `generated-pptx-extra-masters.pptx`, `generated-pptx-master-layout.pptx`, `generated-pptx-relationships.pptx`, `generated-pptx-rich-parts.pptx`, `generated-pptx-thumbnail.pptx`, `generated-xlsx-alt-attributes.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-customxml.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-docprops.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-embedded-legacy-ole.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-embedded-ooxml.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-pivot-cache.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-relationships.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-rich-parts.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-sheetnames.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-slicer-cache.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-threaded-comments.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-thumbnail.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-validation-hyperlink-attrs.xlsx`, `generated-xlsx-vml-drawing.xlsx`, and `generated-xlsx-workbook-table-names.xlsx`
- Negative fixtures: `xlsx-corrupted.xlsx`, `badzip.ppt`, `truncated62886.docx`, `ExternalEntityInText.docx`, `54764.xlsx`, `54764-2.xlsx`, `deep-data.xlsx`, `rde.imf.ru_sites_default_files_rde_documents_vodootvedenie_2020.xlsb.xls`, `invalid.xlsx`, `MultipleCoreProperties.docx`, `OPCCompliance_*FAIL*` packages, `poc-xmlbomb.xlsx`, `poc-xmlbomb-empty.xlsx`, `xxe_in_schema.xlsx`, `xor-encryption-abc.xls`, `password.xls`, `50833.xls`, `51832.xls`, `60284.xls`, `35897-type4.xls`, `42464-ExpPtg-bad.xls`, `MalformedSSTCount.xlsx`, `Divino_Revelado.pptx`, `poi-fuzz.xls`, Apache POI `clusterfuzz-*`/`crash-*` regressions, password/encrypted fixtures, and duplicate-file-name packages

One structural stress fixture is allowed to extract no text/images because it has no document content or metadata text parts: `stress025.docx`.
